title: Freshly Detailed
description: In this pack I retextured some outdated or poorly designed textures while staying true to vanilla experience
body:
# Freshly Detailed
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831f33959cead7d2242c08b3d895116a39cb769d.png)

With **Freshly Detailed** Resource Pack my Goal was to redesign some of the textures that I tought was either outdated or poorly detailed while staying true to vanilla experience, but bringing a slighlty new experience to the game.

In the future I'm planning to update this pack with remaking even more Textures with this style (only items)

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb1cc7d69cde4a500c91750808494cf1ebda2147.png)



**All modified Textures can be found in the gallery**
